binding_class=SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN
action_boundary=Demo deployment DEP11-019 may proceed only if the approved environment and cluster match the requested runtime environment.
cited_evidence=B11-19-SRC-01|B11-19-SRC-02|B11-19-SRC-03|B11-19-SRC-04|B11-19-SRC-05
open_blockers=environment mismatch; production request lacks matching staging approval and rollback scope
final_answer=ESCALATE because DEP11-019 requests production PRD-19 while the approval and rollback plan are scoped to staging STG-19, and production needs separate approval.
